visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a blue Roots Taiwan t-shirt sits on a white sofa. He holds an iPhone 15 Pro displaying a lock screen with a city background. He gestures towards the camera while speaking. The setting is a brightly lit indoor living room with a plain white wall background. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the smartphone screen. A hand enters the frame and long-presses the lock screen to enter the customization menu. The wallpaper features a large gold Bitcoin coin with a crown. (3) The hand taps on the time display, opening a font and color customization menu at the bottom. The person scrolls through various color options and font styles. (4) The hand selects a specific setting that changes the clock's font from a solid white to a multi-colored rainbow gradient. (5) The person taps 'Done' in the top right corner. The camera cuts back to the man smiling and holding up the phone to show the final colored clock effect.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥, @3ctim. [Slogan]: 嘿 教你如何. (2) [Slogan]: 把桌面的時鐘變彩色的. (3) [Slogan]: 來選擇自訂桌布, 自訂. [Variety]: 4:52. [Subtitle]: 10月10日 週五 · 乙巳年八月十九. (4) [Slogan]: 你點選這個數字. [Variety]: 12. (5) [Slogan]: 這個時候你點一下實線. (6) [Slogan]: 再點它一下. (7) [Slogan]: 你看彩色就出現了. (8) [Slogan]: 我的彩色字就出現了. (9) [Slogan]: 完成.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main creator presenting a tutorial.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a blue 'Roots' brand t-shirt with 'TAIWAN' text.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a white sofa and a clean, off-white wall. The focus is entirely on the presenter and the smartphone.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male voice introduces the tutorial over an upbeat acoustic guitar BGM with a steady 115 BPM rhythm. Vocal tone is friendly and authoritative. (2) A crisp digital 'pop' sound effect triggers as the interface is clicked. The speaker's pitch remains modulated and engaging while explaining the steps. (3) Another UI click SFX is heard. The music remains a consistent background bed, not interfering with the clear narration. (4) A final 'bubble' SFX accompanies the selection of the rainbow color. The speaker's arousal levels increase slightly, showing excitement for the result. (5) The speaker concludes with a satisfied tone as the music continues to play through the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step-by-step Process -> Result Display
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate a specific, visually appealing customization feature on the iPhone (changing the clock to a rainbow gradient) to tech-savvy viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presenter is a known tech influencer ('3C Tim') sharing a specific tech tip, which functions as content-based endorsement of the device's features.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses high-visibility text overlays to anchor the spoken instructions, making it highly suitable for silent scrolling on social media, despite having a professional audio track.
